objective: Close F-0174 statically by enforcing one shared bounded student answer input contract across practice, mock_exam, terminal supplement and organization training before any answer snapshot, RAG query or AI scoring boundary can consume unbounded text or selection arrays.
blockedFiles: any schema or migration source, real database/data access, Provider call/configuration/prompt change, permission or quota change, dependency, deployment, secret/env, external service, PR or force-push

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: practice and mock_exam service input plus organization training employee route input -> shared validators -> answer snapshot persistence -> mock_exam RAG and durable AI scoring input
preRedImpactScan.currentVulnerableSink: practice, mock_exam and organization training validators trim/filter unbounded text and selection arrays, permitting large payloads to persist and later amplify RAG and AI scoring work
preRedImpactScan.securityInvariant: every learner answer is rejected before persistence unless text and selection arrays satisfy one explicit shared size, density, type and uniqueness contract; batch answer commands also have a fixed count ceiling
preRedImpactScan.legitimateBehavior: normal objective, subjective, fill_blank, autosave, terminal supplement and organization training submissions retain their existing response and scoring semantics

requiredSemantics.singleContract: practice, mock_exam, supplement and organization training consume one shared runtime answer value validator; no divergent limits or filter-based partial acceptance
requiredSemantics.textLimit: textAnswer is null/absent/empty or a trimmed non-empty string of at most 4000 UTF-16 code units; larger or wrong-typed values fail closed before persistence
requiredSemantics.selectionLimit: selection arrays are dense and contain at most 20 unique non-empty strings, each at most 200 UTF-16 code units; malformed, duplicate, sparse or over-limit arrays fail closed
requiredSemantics.batchLimit: terminal supplement and organization training answer item lists contain at most 200 dense valid items
requiredSemantics.atomicFailure: one invalid item or selection rejects the whole command; no filter, truncation or partial persistence
requiredSemantics.downstream: bounded canonical values are the only answer facts that may reach answer snapshots, RAG queries or AI scoring input
requiredSemantics.scope: no answer meaning, scoring, authorization, schema, Provider execution, quota, UI or API envelope change

validationEvidence.tddRed: 4 suites failed before implementation because the shared student-answer contract did not exist
validationEvidence.lint: passed with 3 pre-existing unrelated warnings and 0 errors
validationEvidence.build: passed with the pre-existing Next output-tracing warning
validationEvidence.adversarialReview: passed: dense-array checks do not skip holes; duplicate values are rejected after trim; oversized and malformed values reject the entire command; practice favorite, terminal supplement, and organization training use the same contract; no schema, permission, quota, Provider, UI, or API expansion
validationEvidence.runtimeBoundary: static and synthetic validation only; no real database, Provider, or browser runtime proof
